nodes.name: MCP Server Trigger
nodes.notes: Exposes an MCP endpoint. Production URL is shown on the node (e.g. http://localhost:5678/mcp/run-standup). Activate the workflow, then `claude mcp add --transport http n8n-standup <that URL>`.

parameters.name: run_standup_workflow
parameters.description: Run today's standup: gather GitHub/Redmine/Slack activity, summarize with Claude, and post to Slack. Call this when the user says 'run my standup'.

nodes.name: run_standup_workflow
nodes.notes: Set workflowId to your Standup workflow (mode 'From list' is easiest in the UI). That Standup workflow MUST have a 'When Executed by Another Workflow' (Execute Workflow Trigger) node.
